description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house surrounded by dense evergreen trees, set on a rectangular grassy plot. The house features a flat roof with multiple levels and sections, including a prominent garage on one side and a main entrance accessible by a stepping stone path. The exterior is primarily composed of brown brick with large, rectangular windows arranged asymmetrically, allowing for ample natural light. The rear of the house includes a curved, windowed section, likely a sunroom or living area, providing panoramic views of the surrounding landscape. The property is bordered by tall coniferous trees, creating a secluded and private atmosphere. The overall design is contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on integration with the natural environment.
description: A large, modern two-story house with a flat roof, brown brick exterior, and expansive windows, surrounded by dense evergreen trees on a grassy plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, stepping stone path, and a clear view of the flat roof and large windows.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the curved, windowed section and the dense tree coverage on the property’s edge.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by tall trees, with the back of the house and its large windows partially visible through the foliage.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the garage, secondary entrance, and the house partially obscured by trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture and curved bay windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, simple door, and a stepping stone path leading from the driveway, no porch or columns.
